item_group: Body-to-chassis mount rubber fabrication package
quantity_to_order: Longman rubber-only package: 10 x BM-ISO-SM square pads plus 2 spares; 2 x BM-ISO-LG square pads plus 1 spare; 2 x FS-OVAL; FS-STRIP-L/R on hold until physical trace; full-width flat liners on hold until identified
ordering_spec: Use docs/longman-rubber-order-spec-20260508.md and data/manual/longman_rubber_order_specs.csv as the current order-line control. Main body pads are square flat custom isolators, not circular/register bushings. FS-STRIP-L/R are candidate holds, not released quantities.
material_spec: New automotive mount-grade black rubber; EPDM or NR/SBR; Shore A 60 +/-5; ozone/weather resistant; no tyre rubber, crumb rubber, mixed offcuts, used rubber, or unmarked salvage rubber
measurements_required_before_order: Confirm flat footprint, free height, sleeve OD/final hole, front oval hole spacing, and installed stack height. For strip/liner holds, first prove the physical carrier/location and trace it.
pre_order_gate: Longman can quote BM-ISO and FS-OVAL now; do not release FS-STRIP-L/R or full-width liners until measurement hold closes.
source_rows: chassis_rubber_requirements CR-MAIN-001/002/CR-FRONT-001/002/003/004; longman_rubber_order_specs BM-ISO-SM/BM-ISO-LG/FS-OVAL/FS-STRIP-L/FS-STRIP-R/BODY-LINER-FULL-WIDTH-HOLD
notes: Current order reflects no visible shaped socket on the chassis/tub side; the primarily preferred body-pad shape is square.

item_group: Body mount sleeve cup shim and hardware package
quantity_to_order: 6 sleeves minimum but order 8 blanks; inspect existing cup/seat washers before deciding replacement; M10 trial bolt pack 16; M10 nuts/washers/repair pack 1; thin shim pack 1; thick spacer control pack 1
ordering_spec: Use data/manual/body_mount_order_release_specs.csv lines BM-HW-001 to BM-HW-005 and BM-SHIM-001 to BM-SHIM-002. Sleeves must fit the M10 bolt and rubber bore and stop over-compression. Washers/cups are separate hardware and do not control Longman rubber shape.
material_spec: Steel tube, cup washers, shims, and structural fasteners; zinc plated, epoxy primed, or painted after cutting; class-marked bolts only
measurements_required_before_order: Confirm bolt pitch and length by station; sleeve ID/OD/length; existing washer/cup condition; cup/dish depth if replacement is needed; original shim stack by position; captive nut condition
pre_order_gate: No random washer stacks inside the rubber sandwich; final sleeve cutting and final bolt length wait for direct measurement/dry-stack
source_rows: chassis_rubber_requirements CR-MAIN-003/004/CR-SHIM-001/CR-HARD-001
notes: Keep the hardware linked to the workstream, but do not include it in the Longman rubber order.

item_group: Firewall column wiper and rear wiring grommet top-up set
quantity_to_order: Top up only after counting existing purchased grommet set; buy assorted sizes plus exact large boots as needed
ordering_spec: Order each grommet by panel hole OD, cable/pipe OD, panel thickness, groove width, and flange OD. Include firewall, steering column, wiper harness, rear wiring, and unused body holes that will remain open.
material_spec: EPDM for weather/firewall use; NBR where oil/fuel mist contact is possible; heat-resistant rubber near engine bay
measurements_required_before_order: Measure every open hole after paint/primer masking plan; record cable/pipe OD and panel thickness
pre_order_gate: Do not buy another bulk kit until the existing grommet inventory is laid out and matched to holes
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 4; parts rows 35, 49, 157, 224
notes: One grommet set appears already procured; this row prevents duplicate generic kits.

item_group: Steering column firewall boot or seal
quantity_to_order: 1 complete boot/seal if the current part is cracked, missing, or loose
ordering_spec: Order by column shaft OD, firewall hole OD, flange shape, mounting hole pattern if present, and column angle. If no exact part is available, fabricate from oil/weather-resistant sheet or boot material using the old sample.
material_spec: EPDM or NBR automotive boot rubber; flexible enough to seal at column angle without tearing
measurements_required_before_order: Measure shaft OD, firewall opening, panel thickness, bolt pattern, and required installed angle
pre_order_gate: Buy only after column, pedals, and firewall penetrations are trial-fitted
source_rows: parts row 144; rubbers_exact_online row 4
notes: Keep separate from small grommet assortments because the column angle and flange shape matter.

item_group: Engine mount inspection note - no active purchase
ordering_spec: Do not order engine mounts under the current engine-installed baseline.
material_spec: Only needed if a future approved supported-engine job reopens replacement.
measurements_required_before_order: Inspect in place after degreasing and under load; photograph cracks, separation, sag, oil-soak failure, stud/thread pattern, and loaded height.
pre_order_gate: Reopen only if mounts fail and another approved job already provides safe engine support; do not buy an engine lift solely for mounts.
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 5; parts rows 22, 212
notes: Removed from active parts list 2026-05-04: current baseline keeps the engine installed and no engine support/removal is planned. Inspect current mounts in place after degreasing and under load; reopen a purchase only if mounts fail and another approved job already provides safe engine support.

item_group: Gearbox transfer mounts and top-cover rubber service items
quantity_to_order: Complete transmission/transfer mount set plus any gear-lever/top-cover rubber seats or boots found worn
ordering_spec: Order by transmission/transfer combination, crossmember bracket spacing, stud/thread pattern, mount height, and shift tower boot/seat dimensions.
material_spec: Oil-resistant bonded rubber-metal mount material for mounts; NBR/EPDM boot rubber depending on oil exposure
measurements_required_before_order: Confirm bracket spacing, stud/thread size, free height, loaded sag, oil contamination, and shift tower rubber condition
pre_order_gate: Inspect after degreasing; buy only the mount style that matches the installed gearbox/transfer case
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 6; parts rows 14, 213
notes: Grouped because transmission support rubber and top-cover rubber may be serviced in the same access window.

item_group: Leaf spring eye and shackle bush set
quantity_to_order: Do not separately order now; if Ironman kit is incomplete, buy only missing quantity for all four springs and shackles/pins
ordering_spec: Use the bushes supplied with the Ironman spring/shackle kit unless the receipt check proves missing, damaged, or incorrect parts. Any replacement must match spring eye ID, shackle/pin OD, sleeve length, bush width, and Ironman instructions.
material_spec: Use Ironman-specified bush material/hardness for the kit; if replacing separately, use matched automotive suspension bushes, not mixed rubber/PU side to side
measurements_required_before_order: Measure spring eye ID, chassis hanger ID, shackle/pin OD, sleeve length, bush flange width, and quantity per eye only if missing from kit
pre_order_gate: Count the Ironman main kit before any separate suspension bush purchase
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online rows 7-8; rubbers_kit_buy row 5; parts rows 160-161
notes: This is the highest duplicate-buy risk. Ironman kit contents control the order.

item_group: Steering bushings and relay/column rubber parts
quantity_to_order: Only the bushings that show measurable play, cracking, swelling, or missing material
ordering_spec: Order by exact steering assembly position, shaft/pin OD, housing bore ID, bush length, and flange/washer style. Do not replace steering wear diagnosis with generic rubber parts.
material_spec: Automotive steering bushing rubber or specified OEM-equivalent material; do not mix unknown hardnesses across paired positions
measurements_required_before_order: Check steering play source first; measure ID, OD, length, flange thickness, and grease/oil exposure
pre_order_gate: Buy after inspection, not from a generic steering category search
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 9; parts row 230
notes: Separate from suspension bushes because steering play diagnosis controls the required part.

item_group: Brake flexible hose set
quantity_to_order: Full vehicle brake flex hose set: front left, front right, and rear/center axle hose; add any axle-to-frame variants found during inspection
ordering_spec: Order complete crimped brake hose assemblies by end fitting type, thread, banjo/flare style, old-sample/free length, and bracket clip groove. OEM/current-style length is acceptable because the Ironman geometry is treated as effectively the same as the current setup.
material_spec: DOT/SAE J1401 or OEM-equivalent hydraulic brake hose assemblies; crimped fittings only; no generic rubber hose
measurements_required_before_order: Measure existing hose length, end fittings, thread pitch, clip groove, and fitted route clearance
pre_order_gate: Buy new before road use; final length decision waits for fitted-end and old-sample confirmation
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 10; rubbers_kit_buy row 7; parts rows 19, 190
notes: Safety-critical. Do not fabricate from non-brake hose.

item_group: Clutch flex hose
quantity_to_order: 1 clutch flex hose if cracked, aged, swollen, leaking, or of unknown service life
ordering_spec: Order by overall length, end fitting type, thread, hard-line interface, slave-cylinder interface, and clip/bracket retention style.
material_spec: Hydraulic clutch/brake-rated flexible hose assembly; crimped ends; fluid-compatible inner liner
measurements_required_before_order: Measure length, thread pitch, flare/banjo type, bracket groove, and routing clearance
pre_order_gate: Buy if condition is uncertain while hydraulic system is accessible
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 11; parts row 197
notes: Use the same discipline as brake hose sourcing; not generic hose.

item_group: Fuel feed return vent hoses and clamps
quantity_to_order: All flexible fuel feed, return, vent, filler-adjacent short connections found on the vehicle plus clamps
ordering_spec: Order hose by inside diameter, total length, bend/routing need, fuel type, pressure exposure, and connection style. Use rolled-edge/fuel-injection style clamps sized to the hose OD.
material_spec: Diesel-compatible fuel hose; SAE J30 R9 preferred for pressure/feed, SAE J30 R7 acceptable only for low-pressure diesel return/vent if verified; NBR/FKM fuel-safe seals; stainless or plated fuel clamps
measurements_required_before_order: Measure each hose ID, total run length, barb OD, clamp size, heat exposure, and abrasion points
pre_order_gate: Replace old unknown fuel hose; do not use coolant, vacuum, washer, or generic rubber hose
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 12; rubbers_kit_buy row 8; parts rows 25, 202, 203, 204
notes: Safety-critical and cheap compared with rework. Label feed, return, and vent separately.

item_group: Tank strap pads sender seal and tank rubber ancillaries
quantity_to_order: 1 sender seal; tank strap pads/anti-chafe strips to suit each strap/contact area; filler/vent rubber pieces if found perished
ordering_spec: Order by sender flange OD, bolt hole PCD/count, strap width, tank contact length, pad thickness, filler/vent neck OD, and clamp size.
material_spec: Fuel-resistant NBR or FKM for sender seal; EPDM/SBR anti-chafe strip acceptable for external tank strap pads if not fuel-wetted
measurements_required_before_order: Measure sender flange, bolt pattern, strap width, pad length/thickness, filler neck OD, and vent hose ID
pre_order_gate: Buy when tank is out or if existing rubber is hard, cracked, fuel-wet, or missing
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 16; rubbers_kit_buy row 8; parts rows 200-201
notes: Do not use foam where it will trap water against the tank or strap.

item_group: Heater hose set
quantity_to_order: All heater feed/return hoses plus clamps if the current hoses are hard, cracked, swollen, or routed incorrectly
ordering_spec: Order by inside diameter, total length, bend radius, firewall/heater valve orientation, and clamp size. Use molded hoses where tight bends would kink straight hose.
material_spec: EPDM coolant/heater hose, SAE J20-type or OEM-equivalent; coolant-rated clamps
measurements_required_before_order: Measure heater pipe OD, engine outlet OD, hose ID, run length, bend radius, and clamp size
pre_order_gate: Buy after engine family, heater box, and valve routing are confirmed
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 13; rubbers_kit_buy row 9; parts rows 26, 207
notes: Not generic water hose; coolant heat and pressure rating matters.

item_group: Radiator coolant hoses thermostat gasket and radiator mount pads
quantity_to_order: Upper/lower radiator hoses, bypass/short coolant hoses, thermostat gasket, and radiator support pads if aged or missing
ordering_spec: Order molded coolant hoses by engine/year/radiator outlet geometry or by exact ID/shape if local. Radiator pads are ordered/cut by support width, pad thickness, and bolt-hole/slot pattern.
material_spec: EPDM coolant hose; coolant-compatible thermostat gasket; EPDM/SBR radiator pad strip not in coolant contact
measurements_required_before_order: Measure outlet/inlet OD, hose path, bend clearance, radiator pad thickness/width, mounting hole spacing, and engine/radiator variant
pre_order_gate: Buy after radiator, engine, and support are trial-positioned
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 14; rubbers_kit_buy row 9; parts rows 28, 30, 206, 210
notes: Radiator pads can be cut locally, but coolant hoses must be coolant-rated.

item_group: Reservoir hoses caps and small coolant seals
quantity_to_order: Reservoir cap, overflow hose, small seals, and O-rings found hard or cracked
ordering_spec: Order by hose ID, cap diameter/pressure if applicable, seal cross-section, and fluid exposure.
material_spec: EPDM for coolant/overflow; coolant-compatible cap seals; avoid fuel hose if not needed
measurements_required_before_order: Measure hose ID/length, cap neck OD, seal ID/OD/cross-section
pre_order_gate: Buy as part of cooling refresh if existing small rubber is aged
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 15; parts row 194
notes: Small parts, but easy to miss during coolant fill.

item_group: Vacuum hose refresh kit
quantity_to_order: Only cracked, oil-softened, collapsed, or missing vacuum hoses; include reinforced brake booster hose if present and aged
ordering_spec: Order by inside diameter, wall stiffness, vacuum function, oil mist exposure, heat exposure, and check-valve/end fitting size. Brake booster hose must be reinforced and vacuum-rated.
material_spec: Vacuum-rated EPDM/NBR/silicone as appropriate; reinforced vacuum hose for booster; oil-resistant hose where crankcase/oil mist exposure exists
measurements_required_before_order: Measure each hose ID, length, barb OD, bend radius, and vacuum function label
pre_order_gate: Do not replace with soft washer hose or thin generic rubber that can collapse
source_rows: parts row 31
notes: Not listed in rubbers_exact_online but present in the parts list and should be specified.

item_group: Floor plugs drain plugs and body hole plugs
quantity_to_order: Assorted body plugs by actual floor/body holes that remain after repair and paint
ordering_spec: Order by hole OD, panel thickness, plug head OD, underside clearance, and whether the plug must be removable.
material_spec: EPDM body plug rubber; oil-resistant NBR only where oil exposure exists
measurements_required_before_order: Measure every final hole after welding/body repair; confirm panel thickness after primer/paint
pre_order_gate: Defer until body metalwork and coating are finished
source_rows: parts row 173 or floor plug/drain plug rows in parts list
notes: Easy to order too early because holes may change during repair.

item_group: Door weatherstrip set
quantity_to_order: Complete door weatherstrip set only after door type and body fit are confirmed
ordering_spec: Order by exact J40 body, door type, year/market, ambulance/regular door style, and seal profile. Prefer a matched kit from one maker for both sides.
material_spec: EPDM automotive weatherstrip extrusion with correct profile and corners
measurements_required_before_order: Confirm door type, hinge/striker fit, aperture repairs, seal channel condition, and paint stage
pre_order_gate: Defer until after body alignment, door gap work, and paint/primer plan are stable
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 17; rubbers_kit_buy row 10; parts row 171
notes: Not needed for chassis/tub refit; large cost driver.

item_group: Windscreen rubber and base seal
quantity_to_order: Windscreen frame/glass seal and base seal only when glass and frame condition are known
ordering_spec: Order by windscreen frame type, glass thickness, body year, seal profile, and whether trim/locking strip is used.
material_spec: EPDM glass/weatherstrip rubber matched to the windscreen profile
measurements_required_before_order: Confirm glass/frame condition, glass thickness, frame repair, and sealing channel after paint
pre_order_gate: Defer until glass stage
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 18; rubbers_kit_buy row 10; parts row 172
notes: Avoid storing folded glass seals for long periods before installation.

item_group: Vent flap cowl and fresh-air seals
quantity_to_order: Vent window/flap/cowl seals as required by the exact body configuration
ordering_spec: Order by vent/flap type, hinge/latch design, seal channel profile, and repaired opening dimensions.
material_spec: EPDM weatherstrip or sponge-rubber profile matching the original compression seal
measurements_required_before_order: Confirm vent/flap hardware, channel condition, and final opening dimensions after body repair
pre_order_gate: Defer until body finish and hardware mock-up
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 19; rubbers_kit_buy row 10; parts row 173
notes: Variant risk is high; buy too early only if an exact kit is confirmed.

item_group: Window rubbers channels and sliding-window seals
quantity_to_order: Window run channels, sliding-window rubbers, glazing seals, and related body/weather seals after hardware audit
ordering_spec: Order by window type, channel width, glass thickness, frame profile, and body style. Keep left/right and front/rear pieces matched as a kit where possible.
material_spec: EPDM glazing/weatherstrip material; flocked run channel where the original uses it
measurements_required_before_order: Confirm window hardware inventory, glass thickness, channel profile, and final painted openings
pre_order_gate: Defer until body and window hardware are ready for assembly
source_rows: parts rows 119-120; rubbers_kit_buy row 10
notes: This catches window rubber rows that are separate from door/windscreen summary rows.

item_group: Exhaust hanger rubbers
quantity_to_order: Only cracked, missing, stretched, or heat-damaged exhaust hangers
ordering_spec: Order by pin diameter, hole spacing, hanger thickness, load rating, and exhaust movement clearance.
material_spec: Automotive exhaust hanger rubber/EPDM compound suitable for heat and vibration
measurements_required_before_order: Measure pin OD, hole spacing, hanger thickness, exhaust alignment, and heat shield clearance
pre_order_gate: Buy during final exhaust alignment or if current hangers are failed
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 20; rubbers_kit_buy row 11; parts row 214
notes: Dimension match matters more than model search for universal hangers.

item_group: Pedal rubbers
quantity_to_order: Brake/clutch pedal pads and accelerator rubber if worn or missing
ordering_spec: Order by pedal arm/pad plate width, height, retaining lip style, and surface pattern.
material_spec: Molded pedal rubber with firm retaining lip; oil-resistant enough for cabin use
measurements_required_before_order: Measure pedal plate width/height/thickness and retaining-lip shape
pre_order_gate: Defer until cabin controls are being assembled
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 22; rubbers_kit_buy row 11; parts row 223
notes: Low urgency; verify pedal plate style before ordering.

item_group: Air-conditioning barrier hoses drain hoses and O-rings
quantity_to_order: Required A/C barrier hose, evaporator drain hose, and O-ring set for the hidden evaporator/compressor/condenser layout
ordering_spec: Order A/C hose by refrigerant type, hose size, fitting orientation, crimp style, and routed length. Order drain hose by outlet OD and fall path. Order O-rings by fitting size and refrigerant compatibility.
material_spec: R134a-compatible barrier hose and crimp fittings; HNBR A/C O-rings; EPDM/PVC drain hose as appropriate
measurements_required_before_order: Measure compressor/condenser/receiver-drier/evaporator fitting sizes, hose route lengths, fitting angles, drain outlet OD, and grommet/bulkhead locations
pre_order_gate: Required for current hidden HVAC refit; do not crimp final hose lengths until component layout is locked
source_rows: rubbers_exact_online row 21; rubbers_kit_buy row 12; parts rows 182, 183, 234, 235, 239, 243; expenses part_hvac_barrier_hose_fittings_20260514 and part_hvac_evaporator_drain_mount_kit_20260514
notes: Final hose fabrication depends on component placement but the row is no longer optional after aftermarket A/C removal.

item_group: HVAC duct and defrost hose kit
quantity_to_order: Required hidden-evaporator outlet ducting and defrost/vent hoses such as 2.5 in / 63.5 mm ID ducting if confirmed by the dash and selected HVAC box
ordering_spec: Order by inside diameter, length, bend radius, outlet OD, clamp/retainer style, and temperature/moisture exposure.
material_spec: Flexible duct hose rated for cabin heat/moisture; avoid brittle thin hose
measurements_required_before_order: Measure evaporator/defrost outlet OD, dash vent OD, required length, and clearance after dash mock-up
pre_order_gate: Required for current hidden HVAC refit; final duct size waits for evaporator, dash, and vent positions
source_rows: parts rows 215-216, 220; expenses part_hvac_duct_defrost_hose_kit_20260514
notes: Separate from A/C refrigerant hoses; this is air ducting for the hidden unit.

item_group: Bump stops
quantity_to_order: Front/rear bump stops if missing, cracked, oil-soaked, too decayed to copy, or too short/tall after Ironman ride-height check
ordering_spec: Use docs/bump-stop-fabrication-spec-20260504.md. Long stop 48304-60010 positions are front-left and rear pair at 70 mm free height. Short right-front 48304-60020 is 60 mm free height. Base footprint, bolt/stud pattern, contact face offset, loaded gap, and full-bump clearance are released from the actual vehicle brackets and strike pads.
material_spec: New NR/SBR automotive bump-stop rubber Shore A 70 +/-5; matched rear pair; do not mix left/right heights
measurements_required_before_order: Measure cleaned bracket BL/BW, bolt/stud pitch P, hole/thread D, strike-pad X/Y offset, loaded gap G, and full-bump limiting clearance F at each station
pre_order_gate: Inspect after Ironman kit is received and ride-height plan is known; do not use decayed old rubber as mould master
source_rows: parts row 148; suspension Ironman workstream; bump-stop fabrication spec
notes: Do not buy universal stops or 70 mm right-front aftermarket stops until suspension height and axle travel are understood.

item_group: Engine air-cleaner intake duct and rubber couplers
quantity_to_order: 1 intake duct/coupler set only if the existing duct is cracked hard oil-softened missing or loose
ordering_spec: Order or fabricate by air-cleaner outlet OD, intake/manifold inlet OD, free length, bend/offset, accordion/compression movement, clamp OD, and any branch/nipple OD. Use the old sample if the part is corrugated or molded.
material_spec: Oil-mist-resistant intake duct rubber or reinforced air duct hose; NBR/EPDM blend or equivalent; do not substitute coolant hose fuel hose or thin HVAC duct
measurements_required_before_order: Measure air cleaner outlet OD, intake inlet OD, old duct free length, installed offset, bend radius, clamp OD, wall condition, and any breather branch size
pre_order_gate: Inspect first; buy only if the visible duct is perished, incorrectly sized, or will not seal under engine movement
source_rows: engine bay audit 2026-05-03; no appropriate fitted air-cleaner/intake-duct photo assigned yet
notes: Tracked separately from coolant/fuel/vacuum hoses; capture a direct air-cleaner-to-intake route photo before final sample-match.

item_group: Formed coolant pipe rubber connector/coupler hoses
quantity_to_order: 2 connector hoses for the formed coolant pipe assembly
ordering_spec: Use replacement-pipe order lines RPO-COOL-006A and RPO-COOL-006B. Direct-buy released: order 2 x 500 mm EPDM radiator/coolant connector blanks, 28-30 mm ID exact order basis. Trim each connector shorter from the old coupler/sample during dry-fit; use molded connectors only if straight hose kinks.
material_spec: EPDM coolant hose SAE J20R3/J20R4 or molded coolant equivalent; smooth-band or constant-tension clamps
measurements_required_before_order: No pre-order measurement hold remains for stock purchase. During dry-fit record finished cut length, hose overlap, clamp band placement, kink clearance, and heat/chafe exposure in mm.
pre_order_gate: Stock order released now; do not install without old coupler/sample and formed pipe dry-fit; do not use straight hose if it kinks or cannot maintain safe overlap on the beaded pipe/spigot.
source_rows: RP-COOL-006; RPO-COOL-006A; RPO-COOL-006B
notes: Added after May 2 pipe photos showed rubber couplers on the fabricated pipe assembly; stock order is now exact, with only final trim controlled at dry-fit.
